user.title: Nordpool EE Prices setup
user.description: Configure polling and your grid fees. All fee fields are in €/kWh (e.g. 1.2 cents = 0.012).

data_description.fast_interval: Minutes between retries while waiting for tomorrow's prices during the 13:45–15:00 publish window.
data_description.slow_interval: Hours between normal price refreshes the rest of the day.
data_description.api_key: Only needed if you set the Forecast Source to Estonia (EE). Get a key from eupowerprices.com and paste it here; leave blank otherwise.
data_description.margin: Retailer/broker margin added to the spot price (€/kWh).
data_description.taastuv: Renewable energy fee added to the spot price (€/kWh).
data_description.aktsiis: Electricity excise added to the spot price (€/kWh).
data_description.elektrilevi_night: Grid transmission tariff for nights, weekends and holidays (€/kWh).
data_description.tasakaal: Import balancing fee added to the spot price (€/kWh).
data_description.varustus: Security of supply fee added to the spot price (€/kWh).
data_description.vat: VAT percentage applied to the final import price (e.g. 24).
data_description.export_margin: Broker margin deducted from the spot price for exported energy (€/kWh).
data_description.export_tasakaal: Balancing fee deducted from exported energy (€/kWh).

init.title: Adjust tariffs, fees & polling
init.description: Update polling intervals and grid fees. All fee fields are in €/kWh (e.g. 1.2 cents = 0.012).
